zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Lewis於1622年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托陶頓時，她的父親Captain William John Collins Lewis19歲，母親Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead10歲。她於大約1647年與Humphrey Gallup在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可多爾斯特結婚。她去世於1665年8月17日在她的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Lewis于1622年出生在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托陶頓时，她的父亲Captain William John Collins Lewis19岁，母亲Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead10岁。她于大约1647年与Humphrey Gallup在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可多爾斯特结婚。她去世于1665年8月17日在她的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lewis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Lewis, Leweis, Lowis, from ancient Germanic (originally West Frankish) Hludwig (itself from hlōd- ‘fame, famous’ + wīg- ‘battle’). This was Latinized as Ludovicus and Chlodovisus, which were gallicized as Clovis or Clouis, French Louis. The name may also appear as Lawis, Laweys, Lawes, by unrounding of the vowel of Lowis on the analogy of the variation between Low and Law as pet forms of Middle English Lourence alias Laurence. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Laws 2 and compare Lawrence .
Welsh: adopted for the Welsh personal name Llywelyn (see Llewellyn ).

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’. This is one of the most common Old Irish personal names. It is derived from Lugh ‘brightness’, which was the name of a Celtic god.

variants.name: Laws
meanings: English: variant of Law (pet form of Lawrence ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Perhaps a shortened form of Scottish or Irish   McLeish  . Compare   McLaws  .

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: McGlew
meanings: Irish: most probably from Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’, a Gaelic personal name (referencing the god Lugh), sometimes Anglicized as Lewis . However, both Woulfe and MacLysaght consider McGlew to be a shortened form of Mac Dhuinnshléibhe (see McAleavey and Dunleavy ).

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Lewis was born in 1622, in Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States, her father, Captain William John Collins Lewis, was 19 and her mother, Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead, was 10. She married Humphrey Gallup about 1647, in Dorchester, Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States. She died on 17 August 1665, in her hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Lewis est née en 1622, à Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Captain William John Collins Lewis, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey Gallup environ 1647, à Dorchester, Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Elle est décédée le 17 août 1665, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Lewis 1622 in Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Captain William John Collins Lewis 19 und ihre Mutter Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead 10. Sie hat um 1647 in Dorchester, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Humphrey Gallup geheiratet. Sie starb am 17. August 1665 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Lewis è nata il nel 1622 nel Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Captain William John Collins Lewis, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey Gallup circa 1647, nel Dorchester, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 17 agosto 1665, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Lewisが1622年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルタウントンで生まれた時，父Captain William John Collins Lewisは19歳，母Sarah Hanhah Stole Meadは10歳であった。約1647年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクドールチェスターでHumphrey Gallupと結婚した。彼女は1665年8月17日に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Lewis(이)가 1622년 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Captain William John Collins Lewis(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 대략 1647년 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 도르체스터에서 Humphrey Gallup(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1665년 8월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Lewis nasceu em 1622, em Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Captain William John Collins Lewis, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey Gallup aproximadamente 1647, em Dorchester, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Ela faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1665, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Lewis родилась в 1622 г. в местности таунтон, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Captain William John Collins Lewis было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Gallup около 1647 г. в местности дорчестир, норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Она умерла 17 августа 1665 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Lewis nació en 1622, en Taunton, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Captain William John Collins Lewis, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Sarah Hanhah Stole Mead, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Humphrey Gallup aproximadamente 1647, en Dorchester, Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1665, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
